name: Burbaloni Lulilolli
lore:
Lore of Burbaloni Lulilolli
                                    


This extraordinary character features a capybara nestled within the confines of a coconut shell. The phenomenon occurs along the pristine coastline of Bali, where such sightings are considered exceptionally rare and precious. When this remarkable creature makes its appearance, local residents come together in joyous celebration, gathering around crackling bonfires to honor and welcome the arrival of Burbaloni Lilylololi. What makes this event so special? The sheer rarity of witnessing such a unique combination of elements transforms each sighting into a community celebration that brings people together in shared wonder and reverence.
Description original text
Burbaloni Luliloli, Capibarello Coccosini! È molto raro trovare sulle coste di Bali una noce di cocco unica nel suo genere che contenga un capibara al suo interno. Si tratta di un evento molto raro in cui la gente del posto si riunisce attorno a un fuoco e celebra l'arriva del dio capibara cocco.
Burbaloni Lililoli, Capy Barello Cocosini! It is very rare to find a copybara in the coconut on the beach in Bali. The event where local residents gather around the bonfire and celebrate the arrival of the Capibara Coconuts.
